requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Disturbance for Lighting Equipment (TIS / CISPR 15 basis)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备 EMC / 无线电骚扰（TIS / CISPR 15 基础）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備 EMC / 無線電騷擾（TIS / CISPR 15 基礎）

summary.en: Electromagnetic disturbance from lighting equipment in Thailand is addressed primarily through TISI's adoption of CISPR 15-based requirements (limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment) and through the safety-standard framework for controlled lighting products. Thailand has historically applied EMC expectations through the relevant TIS standards and, for any product placed under mandatory TIS certification, conformity is assessed by a TISI-recognised laboratory. For wireless/smart luminaires, EMC of the radio part is handled by NBTC type approval (see ledth-emc-02). Exporters should confirm the exact TIS number and edition in force for lighting EMC, as TISI periodically updates its adopted standards to track current CISPR 15 editions.
summary.zh: 泰国对照明设备电磁骚扰的管理主要通过 TISI 采用基于 CISPR 15 的要求（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），以及受控照明产品的安全标准框架实现。泰国历来通过相关 TIS 标准适用 EMC 要求，对纳入强制性 TIS 认证的产品，由 TISI 认可实验室进行合格评定。对于无线/智能灯具，无线电部分的 EMC 由 NBTC 型号核准处理（见 ledth-emc-02）。出口商应确认照明 EMC 现行适用的具体 TIS 编号及版本，因 TISI 会定期更新其采用的标准以追踪现行 CISPR 15 版本。
summary.zht: 泰國對照明設備電磁騷擾的管理主要通過 TISI 採用基於 CISPR 15 的要求（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），以及受控照明產品的安全標準框架實現。泰國歷來通過相關 TIS 標準適用 EMC 要求，對納入強制性 TIS 認證的產品，由 TISI 認可實驗室進行合格評定。對於無線/智能燈具，無線電部分的 EMC 由 NBTC 型號核准處理（見 ledth-emc-02）。出口商應確認照明 EMC 現行適用的具體 TIS 編號及版本，因 TISI 會定期更新其採用的標準以追蹤現行 CISPR 15 版本。

standards_or_laws: TIS standards for lighting EMC adopting CISPR 15 (radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment) — TISI, Ministry of Industry
TISI conformity assessment via recognised laboratory for controlled lighting products

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers safety and EMC for relevant categories). Testing is conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically accepted for Thai TIS licensing — TISI generally requires testing by a TISI-recognised laboratory or under an accepted MRA pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不自动被泰国 TIS 许可所接受——TISI 通常要求由 TISI 认可实验室检测或经认可的互认（MRA）路径。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不自動被泰國 TIS 許可所接受——TISI 通常要求由 TISI 認可實驗室檢測或經認可的互認（MRA）路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Thai lighting EMC requirements and CN GB 17743 share the same CISPR 15 technical base, so the underlying emission limits are broadly harmonised. The principal gaps are procedural and jurisdictional: (1) CN CCC/CNAS EMC test reports are not automatically accepted for Thai TIS licensing — TISI typically requires testing by a TISI-recognised laboratory or under an accepted mutual-recognition pathway; (2) the conformity assessment is tied to a TISI licence held by an in-country importer or manufacturer, not to a self-declaration; (3) the exact adopted TIS number/edition for lighting EMC must be confirmed against TISI's current list, since CISPR 15 editions evolve; (4) any wireless function shifts the radio-emission assessment to NBTC type approval. Exporters should plan for Thailand-specific testing and a TISI licence rather than reusing the CN CCC EMC file.
gap.zh: 泰国照明 EMC 要求与中国 GB 17743 同以 CISPR 15 为技术基础，故底层发射限值基本协调。主要差距属程序及管辖层面：（1）中国 CCC/CNAS EMC 检测报告不自动被泰国 TIS 许可所接受——TISI 通常要求由 TISI 认可实验室检测或经认可的互认路径；（2）合格评定与在地进口商或制造商持有的 TISI 许可证挂钩，而非自我声明；（3）照明 EMC 现行采用的具体 TIS 编号/版本须对照 TISI 现行清单确认，因 CISPR 15 版本不断演进；（4）任何无线功能会将无线电发射评估转至 NBTC 型号核准。出口商应规划泰国专属检测及 TISI 许可，而非沿用中国 CCC EMC 文件。
gap.zht: 泰國照明 EMC 要求與中國 GB 17743 同以 CISPR 15 為技術基礎，故底層發射限值基本協調。主要差距屬程序及管轄層面：（1）中國 CCC/CNAS EMC 檢測報告不自動被泰國 TIS 許可所接受——TISI 通常要求由 TISI 認可實驗室檢測或經認可的互認路徑；（2）合格評定與在地進口商或製造商持有的 TISI 許可證掛鈎，而非自我聲明；（3）照明 EMC 現行採用的具體 TIS 編號/版本須對照 TISI 現行清單確認，因 CISPR 15 版本不斷演進；（4）任何無線功能會將無線電發射評估轉至 NBTC 型號核准。出口商應規劃泰國專屬檢測及 TISI 許可，而非沿用中國 CCC EMC 文件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC/radio-disturbance requirements apply via the relevant TIS standard for controlled lighting products and are assessed under the TISI licence; confirm the exact TIS number/edition in force
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute), Ministry of Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lighting EMC in Thailand is addressed through TISI's CISPR 15-based requirements and assessed under the TIS licence by a TISI-recognised laboratory. Emission limits are broadly harmonised with CN GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but Chinese CCC/CNAS EMC reports are not automatically accepted for TIS licensing, and the radio part of any smart luminaire shifts to NBTC type approval. Confirm the exact TIS number and edition in force for lighting EMC against TISI's current list.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国照明 EMC 通过 TISI 基于 CISPR 15 的要求管理，并在 TIS 许可下由 TISI 认可实验室评定。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC/CNAS EMC 报告不自动被 TIS 许可所接受，且任何智能灯具的无线电部分会转至 NBTC 型号核准。请对照 TISI 现行清单确认照明 EMC 现行适用的具体 TIS 编号及版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國照明 EMC 通過 TISI 基於 CISPR 15 的要求管理，並在 TIS 許可下由 TISI 認可實驗室評定。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC/CNAS EMC 報告不自動被 TIS 許可所接受，且任何智能燈具的無線電部分會轉至 NBTC 型號核准。請對照 TISI 現行清單確認照明 EMC 現行適用的具體 TIS 編號及版本。

requirement_topic.en: NBTC Type Approval for Wireless / Smart LED Luminaires
requirement_topic.zh: 无线/智能 LED 灯具的 NBTC 型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: 無線/智能 LED 燈具的 NBTC 型號核准

summary.en: LED luminaires with built-in wireless functionality (e.g. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee smart lighting) require type approval / certification from the NBTC (National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission of Thailand) before being imported, distributed, or sold. NBTC governs radio equipment and assesses the radio module against its technical standards (covering radio emissions, frequency use, and EMC of the radio part). The process is separate from, and in addition to, TISI's mandatory TIS safety certification for the luminaire. An importer typically files the NBTC application; certain radio equipment classes require an NBTC import licence and the NBTC mark. Frequency bands and power limits must conform to the Thai national frequency plan.
summary.zh: 内置无线功能（如 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 智能照明）的 LED 灯具，在进口、分销或销售前须取得泰国国家广播电信委员会（NBTC）的型号核准/认证。NBTC 管理无线电设备，按其技术标准（涵盖无线电发射、频率使用及无线电部分的 EMC）评估无线电模块。该流程独立于并附加于 TISI 对灯具的强制性 TIS 安全认证之上。通常由进口商提交 NBTC 申请；特定无线电设备类别须取得 NBTC 进口许可及 NBTC 标志。频段及功率限值须符合泰国国家频率规划。
summary.zht: 內置無線功能（如 Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 智能照明）的 LED 燈具，在進口、分銷或銷售前須取得泰國國家廣播電信委員會（NBTC）的型號核准/認證。NBTC 管理無線電設備，按其技術標準（涵蓋無線電發射、頻率使用及無線電部分的 EMC）評估無線電模組。該流程獨立於並附加於 TISI 對燈具的強制性 TIS 安全認證之上。通常由進口商提交 NBTC 申請；特定無線電設備類別須取得 NBTC 進口許可及 NBTC 標誌。頻段及功率限值須符合泰國國家頻率規劃。

standards_or_laws: NBTC type approval / equipment certification for radio and telecommunications equipment (National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission, Thailand)
Thai national frequency allocation plan and NBTC technical standards for short-range / wireless devices

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires (smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval, which assesses the radio module against China's radio technical standards. CCC certification covers the product safety and EMC, while SRRC covers the radio part. Chinese SRRC approval is China-specific and is not recognised by Thailand's NBTC — a separate NBTC type approval is required for the Thai market.
summary.zh: 在中国，具备无线功能的灯具（具 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED）须取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，按中国无线电技术标准评估无线电模块。CCC 认证涵盖产品安全和 EMC，SRRC 涵盖无线电部分。中国 SRRC 核准为中国特有，不被泰国 NBTC 承认——泰国市场须另行取得 NBTC 型号核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，具備無線功能的燈具（具 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED）須取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，按中國無線電技術標準評估無線電模組。CCC 認證涵蓋產品安全和 EMC，SRRC 涵蓋無線電部分。中國 SRRC 核准為中國特有，不被泰國 NBTC 承認——泰國市場須另行取得 NBTC 型號核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China (State Radio Regulation Commission)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (covers product safety/EMC, not the radio part)

gap.en: A smart/wireless LED luminaire that holds Chinese SRRC approval still requires a fresh NBTC type approval for Thailand — there is no mutual recognition between SRRC and NBTC. Key gaps: (1) NBTC application is filed for the Thai market, typically by the importer, and may require an import licence and the NBTC mark; (2) frequency bands and transmit power must conform to the Thai national frequency plan, which can differ from China's allocation, so a module compliant in China may need re-verification or re-configuration; (3) NBTC certification is in addition to TISI's TIS safety certification — both are required for a smart luminaire; (4) Thai documentation and a local responsible entity are needed. Exporters should treat NBTC as a distinct, parallel approval track and budget time for it alongside the TIS licence.
gap.zh: 持有中国 SRRC 核准的智能/无线 LED 灯具，进入泰国仍须重新取得 NBTC 型号核准——SRRC 与 NBTC 之间无互认。主要差距：（1）NBTC 申请须为泰国市场提交，通常由进口商办理，并可能须取得进口许可及 NBTC 标志；（2）频段及发射功率须符合泰国国家频率规划，其可能不同于中国的分配，故在中国合规的模块可能须重新验证或重新配置；（3）NBTC 认证附加于 TISI 的 TIS 安全认证之上——智能灯具二者均须取得；（4）须备泰文文件及在地责任实体。出口商应将 NBTC 视为独立的并行核准路径，并与 TIS 许可一并预留时间。
gap.zht: 持有中國 SRRC 核准的智能/無線 LED 燈具，進入泰國仍須重新取得 NBTC 型號核准——SRRC 與 NBTC 之間無互認。主要差距：（1）NBTC 申請須為泰國市場提交，通常由進口商辦理，並可能須取得進口許可及 NBTC 標誌；（2）頻段及發射功率須符合泰國國家頻率規劃，其可能不同於中國的分配，故在中國合規的模組可能須重新驗證或重新配置；（3）NBTC 認證附加於 TISI 的 TIS 安全認證之上——智能燈具二者均須取得；（4）須備泰文文件及在地責任實體。出口商應將 NBTC 視為獨立的並行核准路徑，並與 TIS 許可一併預留時間。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (for wireless products) — NBTC type approval / certification required before importing, distributing, or selling LED luminaires with wireless functionality in Thailand; NBTC import licence and mark may apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for wireless products) — SRRC type approval required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China, separate from CCC

source.publisher: NBTC (National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission), Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires with wireless/smart functions require NBTC type approval in Thailand before import or sale, separate from and additional to TISI's TIS safety certification. Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised by NBTC — a fresh Thai approval is required, with frequency bands and transmit power conforming to the Thai national frequency plan. Exporters should plan NBTC as a parallel track to the TIS licence, filed in-country, typically by the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 具无线/智能功能的 LED 灯具在泰国进口或销售前须取得 NBTC 型号核准，独立于并附加于 TISI 的 TIS 安全认证。中国 SRRC 核准不被 NBTC 承认——须重新取得泰国核准，频段及发射功率须符合泰国国家频率规划。出口商应将 NBTC 规划为与 TIS 许可并行的路径，在地（通常由进口商）提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 具無線/智能功能的 LED 燈具在泰國進口或銷售前須取得 NBTC 型號核准，獨立於並附加於 TISI 的 TIS 安全認證。中國 SRRC 核准不被 NBTC 承認——須重新取得泰國核准，頻段及發射功率須符合泰國國家頻率規劃。出口商應將 NBTC 規劃為與 TIS 許可並行的路徑，在地（通常由進口商）提交。
